# scripts.cosmicarcmedia.com

Static host for Cosmic Arc Media client script packages & video proposals.
Served by GitHub Pages. Each proposal lives at `/<slug>/index.html`.

**Do not edit by hand.** Publish with `cam-publish <file.html> --slug <slug>`
(or the `/cam-publish` skill in Claude). Pages are unlisted: only people with
the link can find them.
